title: Monitor for maintainer/vendor input or human reflect result

checks.result: Machine gates 01-07 remain closed; gate 08 remains human-only b4 send --reflect review. No send was run.
A733 RTC remains v1 PATCH 0/7; A733 CCU/PRCM remains PATCH RFC 0/8; A733 pinctrl remains RFC 0/9.
External search found no public lore/LKML hit for A733/SUN60IW2 sunxi-mmc IDMAC descriptor-read that changes the blocker.

decision: No new runtime behavior patch and no upstream send action. The project remains in two wait states: runtime blocker awaits maintainer/vendor/source-backed input, and DTS series awaits human reflect review.
next_action: Repeat monitor or run human H142 reflect-only command on Strix. Only queue runtime patch work if new input names a concrete register, reset/clock order, firmware handoff, master ID, binding, or erratum.
